messages.message: Easy money!
Go for it!
These buildings are blocking the view.
Knock a few of them down!
One of those cops gave me a ticket yesterday.
Teach them a lesson!
You're way too slow
Use your sprint more often!
The military thinks they can stop you.
Show them who's in charge!
This city still looks too peaceful.
Let's make everyone panic.
Those military trucks are annoying.
Blow them up!
Bet you can't dodge those missiles.
Prove me wrong.
You've been causing chaos all day.
Maybe eat something healthy.
Those armored carriers are still rolling.
Time to scrap them.
You've been just sitting there too long.
Get moving already!
That bridge is way too sturdy looking.
Bring it down!
Stream's been slow for the last 10 minutes.
Spice things up a bit!
I just dropped a superchat for this.
Make it count!
There's a whole vault over there.
Go crack it open!
More cops just rolled in.
Send them packing!
That radio tower keeps calling for backup.
Cut their comms!
That parking garage is an eyesore.
Flatten it!
There's a chopper circling above.
Don't let it get a clean shot!
You look a little sluggish.
Pick up the pace!
There's a supply convoy heading downtown.
Intercept it!
They put up barricades on the main road.
Smash right through!
That searchlight keeps spotting you.
Take it out before it calls more units!
There's a fuel depot just south of here.
Light it up!
There's a sniper on that rooftop.
Knock the whole building down!
Some VIP is trying to escape by helicopter.
Don't let them get away!
That construction site looks unfinished anyway.
Finish the job for them!
That alarm has been blaring nonstop.
Shut it down for good!
Their radar dish keeps tracking you.
Blind them!
That warehouse is storing their gear.
Clear it out!
Cutting the power grid would cause real chaos.
Pull the plug!
There's a helicopter pad reloading units right now.
Don't let them take off!
An armored column just rolled in from the highway.
Stop them in their tracks!
People are starting to evacuate already.
Hurry before they all get away!
They're trying to seal off the bridge.
Break through before they finish!
There's a whole unit hiding in the subway station.
Flush them out!
Their command center is right behind that wall.
Bring the whole thing down!
They're calling in an airstrike on this position.
Get out of the blast zone fast!
More reinforcements are inbound from the east.
Cut them off before they arrive!
That scaffolding is full of snipers.
Bring it crashing down!
There's a chemical plant storing their supplies.
Time to make it boom!
They set up a checkpoint at the toll booth.
Crash right through it!
There's a rooftop radio relay coordinating their attacks.
Smash it before they regroup!
They're using the stadium as a staging ground.
Storm it!
That dam upstream could flood the whole valley.
Let's see what happens if you crack it.
The mall got turned into a makeshift fortress.
Break it down!
Traffic is backing up the whole highway right now.
Give them something to really panic about.
There's a whole carnival set up downtown.
Time to crash the party.
That offshore oil rig is funding their operation.
Sink it!
That substation powers their whole defense grid.
Take it offline!
Another convoy just left the base.
Don't let it reach the city.
That watchtower has eyes on the whole block.
Knock it down before they spot you.
If that flare goes up, everyone's coming.
Take out the shooter first.
Their bunker entrance is hidden behind that wall.
Break it open!
They're loading supplies onto the pier right now.
Sink the whole operation.
That backup generator keeps their base running.
Pull the plug on them!
There's a train full of supplies at the railyard.
Derail it!
They're using the bell tower as a lookout.
Ring it one last time, the hard way.
That factory's been producing their gear nonstop.
Shut the whole line down.
